_comment: Danielian Pursuit Intelligence scoring rubric (spec §6). Config-driven and tunable during the pilot WITHOUT code changes. Calibrate with Deborah Muro in Week 3. Consumed by scripts/score-lib.js.

legislativePoints._comment: Awarded once if any 'why now' tailwind is present (SB 79 corridor / density-bonus / builder's-remedy).

tiers._comment: score >= threshold assigns the tier. Below tier3 = Drop.

tierLabels.1: Tier 1 — Act now (full dossier in the Brief)
